author: Barbatos Labs
name: Barbatos.Wpf App (Aquarius + Core)
description: A starter WPF app referencing both Barbatos.Wpf.Core (MAUI-style hosting/DI) and Barbatos.Wpf.Aquarius (Vue-style reactivity/Setup), with Setup.ServiceProvider wired to Core's DI container so Views resolve ViewModels through the same graph rather than the two packages merely coexisting.

PackageVersion.description: Version of Barbatos.Wpf.Core/Barbatos.Wpf.Aquarius to reference - override with --PackageVersion if it has moved on from the default by the time you use this.
